Acceptance Criteria: Wildcard and discard patterns work in match arms and destructuring binds without introducing alternate execution semantics, diagnostics stay explicit for illegal positions, and tests cover ignored-value behavior.
PR Split: PR-1 parser/pattern surface; PR-2 sema legality and lowering; PR-3 tests/docs

Acceptance Criteria: Expression-level where clauses desugar to deterministic local bindings, preserve left-to-right evaluation, and docs/tests define exactly where where can appear in v0.
PR Split: PR-1 syntax surface; PR-2 sema scope plus IR desugaring; PR-3 tests/docs

Acceptance Criteria: Method-style calls over existing free functions resolve through ordinary call semantics, name lookup rules are explicit, and disasm/verified tests prove no object model or hidden dispatch path was introduced.
PR Split: PR-1 parse surface and precedence; PR-2 sema resolution and IR desugaring; PR-3 tests/docs

Acceptance Criteria: let-else lowers to explicit failure/early-exit flow over existing guard semantics, works first for destructuring-capable patterns only, and diagnostics explain unsupported targets and pattern forms.
PR Split: PR-1 surface syntax; PR-2 sema target restrictions and lowering; PR-3 tests/docs

Acceptance Criteria: If and only if a canonical record value model exists, field punning supports {x, y} and matching let {x, y} forms as pure sugar over explicit field names, with no separate record runtime path.
PR Split: PR-1 gate on record-layer prerequisite; PR-2 parser and sema sugar; PR-3 tests/docs
